name: data.police.uk Data Downloads
primary_use: Street-level crime, outcomes, stop-and-search bulk CSV; force/LSOA/month coverage.
main_limitations: Street-level locations are approximate; not all outcome fields are present for all crimes; stop-search availability varies.
evidence_required: download_month; force; file_size; row_count; date_range; checksum; schema_columns

name: data.police.uk Street-level Crimes API
primary_use: Point/poly based street-level crime query for validation samples and gap checks.
main_limitations: Location is approximate; API response can omit outcome_status for some crimes; API should not be used as sole high-volume pipeline if bulk CSV is available.
evidence_required: request_url; date; lat_lng_or_poly; http_status; record_count; sample_hash

name: data.police.uk Street-level Outcomes / Outcomes for Crime
primary_use: Outcome severity/clearance context; supports confidence and severity weighting.
main_limitations: Outcome data can lag and may be missing for some crimes.

name: ONS LSOA December 2021 Boundaries EW
primary_use: Centroid/point-in-polygon spatial match from parcel/UPRN/postcode to LSOA.
main_limitations: Boundary generalisation level must match intended accuracy; use BFE/BSC appropriately.

name: ONS Postcode Directory
primary_use: Postcode to OA/LSOA/MSOA/admin geographies; fallback bridge where parcel-to-LSOA geometry is weak.
main_limitations: Postcode centroid/lookup is not a parcel boundary; terminated/current postcode handling required.

name: OS Open UPRN
primary_use: UPRN point locations for addressable properties; helps bridge parcel/property to small-area geography.
main_limitations: Open UPRN has identifier/geometry but not full address attributes; cannot by itself confirm parcel boundary.

name: HM Land Registry INSPIRE Index Polygons
primary_use: Registered freehold property polygon context; aids parcel-to-title geometry evidence where appropriate.
main_limitations: Sub-set of registered property; conditions of use apply; polygon is indicative extent, not all land/property coverage.

name: English Indices of Deprivation 2025 — Crime Domain
primary_use: Independent LSOA-level long-term crime/victimisation domain for cross-source agreement and baseline risk calibration.
main_limitations: Relative deprivation index; snapshot and not real-time police incidents. Use as cross-check, not current incident source.

name: AAYS/Terrayield local parcel data
primary_use: Target parcel geometries/features to receive security score and evidence metadata.
main_limitations: Depends on source lineage and geometry quality; must be audited separately.
evidence_required: feature_count; geometry_type_counts; crs; parcel_id_field; null_geometry_count; duplicate_id_count
